src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the JHipster generated annotation to reflect the current generator version.
Reformat the annotation interface to use a single-line declaration style.
Update Liquibase properties import to match Spring Boot 3 package structure.
Exclude H2 Console auto-configuration to align with security best practices or framework defaults.
Rename logger instance to uppercase constant to follow Java naming conventions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(...);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use var keyword for local variable type inference where type is obvious.
Extract application name property to a local variable for cleaner logging statement.
Adjust indentation and line breaks in text blocks and method calls for readability.
Reformat string concatenation in pointcut definitions for better readability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Adjusted indentation and line breaks in `@Pointcut` annotations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reformat method call arguments in logging statements for better readability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Adjusted indentation and line breaks in `logger().error()` calls.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Prevent potential NullPointerException when logging exception cause in production profile.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed `e.getCause()` to `String.valueOf(e.getCause())` in the else branch of `logAfterThrowing`.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use local variable type inference for cleaner code.
Introduce a nested Liquibase configuration class with an asyncStart property to the ApplicationProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private final Liquibase field, getter, and static inner class with asyncStart boolean and its accessors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Convert instance logger field to static final constant following standard Java logging conventions.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable initialization.
Replace deprecated ILoggingEvent.getMarker() with getMarkerList() to comply with newer SLF4J/Logback API standards.
Rename constant SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better naming consistency.
Remove unused GitProperties and BuildProperties fields and their setter injection methods.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed private fields gitProperties and buildProperties and their @Autowired setter methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the KeyGenerator bean definition that depended on the removed properties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed the @Bean method keyGenerator() returning PrefixedKeyGenerator.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot import paths to match the new package structure in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed imports from org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.cache to org.springframework.boot.cache.autoconfigure and similar for Hibernate.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Clean up imports that are no longer used after removing the KeyGenerator bean.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for KeyGenerator, PrefixedKeyGenerator, GitProperties, BuildProperties, and unused context annotations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use var keyword for local variable declaration to reduce verbosity.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed JHipsterProperties.Cache.Ehcache ehcache to var ehcache.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reformat the Ehcache configuration builder chain for better readability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Adjusted indentation and line breaks in the CacheConfigurationBuilder chain.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Enable configuration properties for H2 console to support conditional bean creation.
Add conditional annotation to H2 TCP server bean to only start if H2 console is enabled.
Refactor logger instance to be static final for better performance and standard practice.
Use var keyword for local variable declaration to reduce verbosity.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for local variable to modernize code style.
Remove the explicit registration of Hibernate5JakartaModule from Jackson configuration, likely because it is now auto-configured by the framework or no longer needed.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import of Hibernate5JakartaModule and deleted the hibernate5Module() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot import paths to reflect the package restructuring in Spring Boot 3.x (moving from `autoconfigure` to specific module packages).
Introduce a configuration property to allow toggling between synchronous and asynchronous Liquibase startup.
Convert Liquibase contexts from a List to a comma-delimited String to match the expected API signature.
Convert Liquibase label filters from a List to a comma-delimited String to match the expected API signature.
Replace the deprecated `acceptsProfiles(Profiles.of(...))` method with the newer `matchesProfiles(...)` API.
Change the logger instance from a non-static final field to a static final field following standard Java logging conventions.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target framework version.
Change the thrown exception type from JsonProcessingException to JacksonException to match the new Jackson API.
Replace explicit type declarations with var for local variables to modernize the code style.
